prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2023年最低位次约7595名，2024年大幅前移至6099名（前移约1496名），2025年小幅后移至6499名（后移约400名），近三年波动较大，2025年基准约6499名；本省理科计划2023年68人、2024年67人、2025年73人，2026年计划80人，较2025年扩招约9.6%，扩招对竞争略有缓解，但幅度有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211 、双一流高校；软科主榜2026年约第67名，近年排名在54-67名之间波动，整体处于中上水平；2023年声誉评价中性/混合，无重大负面舆情；抖音热度总排名第 68位，评价为一般，短视频曝光量中等，未出现明显报考关注升温信号；安全科学与工程A+（全国顶尖）、测绘科学与技术A-、土木工程A-，其中安全科学与工 程类为招生专业之一，对相关方向考生有吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校核心专业矿业类、安全科学与工程类属传统工科，社会热度一般；本省2026年考生总数约23.8万人 ，较2025年约7.65万人大幅增长约211%，竞争显著加剧，较2024年390分上升31分，反映整体竞争升温。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动、 2026年扩招约9.6%及本省考生总数大幅增长约211%，考生规模暴增是最大影响因素，预计竞争加剧使最低录取位次前移；在2025年基准6499名基础上，经供需弹性计算后结合考生 规模大幅增长等因素修正，预测最低位次约6773名，区间6273-7273名。

- 能源动力类（储能科学与工程、能源与动力工程）

二档（中等）

major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 矿业类（智能采矿工程、新能源科学与工程、采矿工程、工业工程）
- 化工与制药类（化学工程与工艺、应用化学、能源化学工程）

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间6273-7273名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报，一档专业可冲刺（尤其自动化、计算机类），三档专业作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<6273名）可重点冲刺 一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（>7273名）建议以三档为主、二档为辅。安全科学与工程类虽学科评估A+但社会热度一般，性价比高，值得重点关注。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2023, the minimum ranking was approximately 7595, which significantly moved forward to 6099 in 2024 (a forward shift of about 1496), and slightly moved back to 6499 in 2025 (a backward shift of about 400). The fluctuations over the past three years have been large, with the 2025 baseline around 6499. The provincial science enrollment plan was 68 in 2023, 67 in 2024, 73 in 2025, and the 2026 plan is 80, an increase of about 9.6% compared to 2025. The expansion slightly alleviates competition, but the extent is limited.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, it is approximately 67th, with recent rankings fluctuating between 54th and 67th, overall at an upper-middle level. The reputation evaluation in 2023 was neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion. The overall Douyin popularity ranking is 68th, rated as average, with moderate short video exposure and no clear signal of increased application attention. Safety Science and Engineering is A+ (top in the country), Surveying and Mapping Science and Technology is A-, and Civil Engineering is A-. Among these, Safety Science and Engineering is one of the enrollment majors, attracting candidates interested in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The university's core majors, such as Mining and Safety Science and Engineering, are traditional engineering fields with generally average social popularity. In 2026, the total number of candidates in the province is approximately 238,000, a significant increase of about 211% compared to about 76,500 in 2025, leading to sharply intensified competition. Compared to 2024's 390 points, it has risen by 31 points, reflecting an overall heating up of competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuations in historical rankings, the approximately 9.6% enrollment expansion in 2026, and the massive increase of about 211% in the total number of candidates in the province, the surge in candidate numbers is the biggest influencing factor. It is expected that intensified competition will cause the minimum admission ranking to move forward. Based on the 2025 baseline of 6499, after supply-demand elasticity calculations and corrections for factors such as the significant increase in candidate numbers, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 6773, with a range of 6273-7273.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Automation
- Mechanical Engineering (Mechanical Engineering, Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering)
- Energy and Power Engineering (Energy Storage Science and Engineering, Energy and Power Engineering)
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Information Security, Data Science and Big Data Technology)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Remote Sensing Science and Technology
- Safety Science and Engineering (Safety Engineering, Fire Engineering, Occupational Health Engineering, Emergency Technology and Management)
- Engineering Mechanics
- Surveying and Mapping (Surveying and Mapping Engineering, Geographic Information Science)
- Materials Science and Engineering
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Mining Engineering (Intelligent Mining Engineering, New Energy Science and Engineering, Mining Engineering, Industrial Engineering)
- Chemical and Pharmaceutical Engineering (Chemical Engineering and Technology, Applied Chemistry, Energy Chemical Engineering)
- Geology (Geological Engineering, Resource Exploration Engineering)
- Civil Engineering (Civil Engineering, Engineering Management, Building Environment and Energy Application Engineering)
- Environmental Engineering
- Earth Information Science and Technology
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 6273-7273, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, with Tier 1 majors as a reach (especially Automation and Computer Science), and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<6273), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>7273), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 majors with Tier 2 as a supplement. Although Safety Science and Engineering has an A+ discipline evaluation, its social popularity is average, offering high cost-effectiveness and worth special attention.

学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 67th on the Soft Science Main Ranking in 2026, with stable rankings in recent years.
